feed.title: Thomas Dallard
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Generate a .lib linked with Vulkan and GLM

link.title: Generate a .lib linked with Vulkan and GLM

entry.summary: Coucou ! Ceci est un test! #pragma once #include <vulkan/vulkan.hpp> #include <glm/matrix.hpp> struct Component { glm::mat4 model; }; namespace ARE { class Context { private: VkAllocationCallbacks* allocator = nullptr; VkInstance instance; public: Context(); ~Context(); }; } #include "Context.hpp" #include <iostream> namespace ARE { Context:...

entry.title: Git : Everything you have to know

link.title: Git : Everything you have to know

entry.summary: Git environnment What is git? Git is a program. You can use it if you want to save files on a remote server, similar to google drive and the cloud. The reasons why git is loved by programmers are : Because it keeps a version of old files. If a crash suddenly occurs in your code, you can just go back to a previous version, when it worked. Because you can merge files. if multiple programme...

entry.title: Exercises for all languages
entry.summary: For / while The following exercises only require a loop (for or while), print(), and variables. They don’t require anything else, like if statements, functions, arrays, etc. Display all numbers from 1 to 100 Display all numbers from 1 to 100 and then display “Finished” Display all numbers from 1 to 100, but skipping 1 out of 2 numbers Display all numbers ...

entry.title: C Exercises
entry.summary: Template Containers Make std::array Make std::vector Make std::forward_list Make std::list Make std::map / std::set Make std::unordered_map / std::unordered_set Smart pointers Make std::unique_ptr Make std::shared_ptr Make std::weak_ptr
